sourceCommands: execute exact-head outbox worker process, image and IaC acceptance
maturityBoundary: Desired-state repository topology and exact-head process/image acceptance only. No production-like Kubernetes cluster, cloud account or production runtime was accepted.

local.finding: Single-node development composition with hardcoded local-only credentials.

ci.finding: Exact-head PostgreSQL, worker process/image and security workflows exist.

staging.finding: No accepted immutable staging deployment manifest or runtime evidence was found.

production_like_acceptance.finding: No deployed acceptance environment, topology snapshot, artifact digest set or rollback evidence was found.

production.finding: Repository state cannot support a production operational acceptance claim.

findings: Non-root image and rolling Deployment exist.
HPA, probes, PDB and resource boundaries exist.
Image reference uses a mutable tag rather than an immutable digest.
No deployed replica-failure evidence exists.
Two replicas and HPA are declared.
No immutable digest promotion or runtime failover evidence exists.

components.authority: PostgreSQL outbox_entries through dedicated app_outbox principal
findings: A dedicated non-HTTP Nest process graph and non-root distroless image exist.
Two-replica Helm desired state requires immutable digest, anti-affinity, PDB, probes and maxUnavailable zero.

Exact-head acceptance proved two OS processes, PostgreSQL 16 leases, app_outbox least privilege, Kafka delivery, peer kill failover, zero duplicate deliveries in the clean scenario and graceful shutdown.
No production-like Kubernetes pod, rolling deployment, backlog SLA or cluster-failure evidence exists.
No accepted general background worker process topology was found.
PostgreSQL 16 authority is established.
Local and CI are single-node.
No HA operator or managed-cluster contract, pooler, WAL archive or failover evidence exists.
No PgBouncer or equivalent accepted topology was found.
Local Redis exists.
Production necessity, HA and failure behavior are not accepted.
Local MinIO exists.
Versioning, object lock, quarantine, backup and restore are unproven.
Ingress and TLS desired state exist.
Hostnames and certificates are not proven in an acceptance environment.
Vault integration is declared.
Local compose uses dev mode and hardcoded local credentials.
No production-like secret rotation evidence exists.
Local stack exists.
Alert routing, ownership, retention and request-to-worker trace proof are missing.
No accepted backup storage topology or immutable retention evidence was found.
Live bank, state, EDI, EPD and identity providers remain outside this contour.
Sandbox or internal test authority must never be exposed as live.

blockingAcceptanceGaps: Remove five obsolete external commit status publishers.
Deploy and accept the independent outbox worker in production-like Kubernetes, including peer kill, rolling deployment and backlog recovery SLA.
Replace mutable API and web image tags with immutable digests and prove build-once promotion.
Deploy PostgreSQL 16 HA, pooler, WAL archive and PITR.
Accept S3-compatible evidence custody and object restore.
Deploy production-like observability with alert verification.
Prove rolling deployment and rollback without invariant violations.
Run target load, chaos, backup/restore, security and operational soak.
